## Identity

The diamond's fork point: the borrowed army meets the enemy at Wrackmoor
and the battle immediately goes wrong in two directions at once — a beach
rout at Graycliff and a burning granary, both converging downstream on the
Salt Debt Massacre. The Brined Company fought here, for what that was
worth.
